question: Identify the Chicago city department that consistently ranked in the top five for ordinance appropriations (with non-zero budget) and also had the highest average salary budget recommendations from the year from 2017-2022 that has the highest total daily census records from Allegheny County Jail. Who was brought the first head of this department, and at which university did he obtain his bachelor's degree? Finally, in what year was that university founded? Report the year from 2017-2022 that has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Counting records by year from census_date for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 1202002 in 2019.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total daily census records from Allegheny County Jail? (Use census_date to derive year; count records by year and select the maximum.)

2.fact: Filtering FlightType = "Charter" and summing Passenger_Count by year (from ReportPeriod) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 25993 in 2021.
2.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total Charter flight passengers over Los Angeles international airports? (Filter FlightType == "Charter"; derive year from ReportPeriod; sum Passenger_Count by year and select the maximum.)

3.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($4,947,717,643.00), 57 CPD ($1,656,002,057.00), 85 AVIATION ($911,289,787.00), 59 CFD ($652,282,316.00), and 50 DFSS ($633,571,744.00).
3.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2019 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

4.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($5,914,554,145.00), 57 CPD ($1,762,078,349.00), 85 AVIATION ($871,219,092.00), 50 DFSS ($686,392,402.00), and 59 CFD ($674,228,297.00).
4.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2020 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

5.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Ordinance Appropriations dataset, the top 5 departments by total ordinance amount were: 99 FINANCE GENERAL ($5,681,317,598.00), 57 CPD ($1,698,735,503.00), 85 CDA ($1,141,154,450.00), 50 DFSS ($780,489,814.00), and 84 CDOT ($770,356,074.00).
5.subquestion: Which department numbers were in the top 5 by total ordinance appropriation in each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: group by DEPARTMENT NUMBER; sum 2021 ORDINANCE (AMOUNT $); rank desc; take top 5.)

6.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,293,487,079.00), 85 ($144,020,555.00), 50 ($42,342,535.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
6.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

7.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,308,621,421.00), 85 ($159,362,510.00), 50 ($42,996,687.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
7.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

8.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 1 department numbers were: 57 ($1,277,019,448.00), 85 ($158,941,618.00), 50 ($43,046,519.00), and 99 ($0.00; no rows for that department code).
8.subquestion: For the department numbers (from hop 1), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Ordinance Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 1 intersection {99, 57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

9.fact: According to the 2019 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,293,460,481.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $144,015,863.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $42,342,535.00.
9.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

10.fact: According to the 2020 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,308,615,601.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $159,389,114.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $42,996,687.00.
10.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

11.fact: According to the 2021 Chicago Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset, total budgeted amounts for the hop 2 department codes were: 57 (Chicago Police Department) $1,277,090,115.00; 85 (Chicago Department of Aviation) $158,946,654.00; 50 (Department of Family and Support Services) $43,048,415.00.
11.subquestion: For the department codes (from hop 2), what were the total budgeted amounts in the Budget Recommendations Positions and Salaries dataset for each year 2019-2021? (Filter for this node: DEPARTMENT CODE in hop 2 list {57, 85, 50}; sum TOTAL BUDGETED AMOUNT by DEPARTMENT CODE.)

12.fact: Criminologist O. W. Wilson was brought on as Superintendent of Police, and served until 1967 when he retired. This position, in its current iteration, has existed as the head of the Chicago Police Department since 1960.
12.subquestion: Who was brought on as Superintendent of Police when the position (current iteration) was established as head of the department (from hop 3)?

13.fact: O. W. Wilson received his B.A. from the University of California, Berkeley.
13.subquestion: At which university did O. W. Wilson (from hop 4) obtain his bachelor's degree?

14.fact: The University of California, Berkeley was founded in 1868 and named after the Anglo-Irish philosopher George Berkeley; it is the state's first land-grant university and the founding campus of the University of California system.
14.subquestion: In what year was the University of California, Berkeley (from hop 5) founded?
